positive: A stylized, symmetrical geometric arrangement of abstract woodland creatures—a minimalist fox, deer, and raven—integrated into a continuous line art tapestry. The design uses strong black silhouettes against a creamy off-white background, utilizing negative space effectively. The style should be inspired by modern Nordic folk art and Art Deco geometry, emphasizing clean, bold lines and rhythmic patterns. Composition must be perfectly centered and suitable for repeating fabric patterns. Lighting is flat and uniform, enhancing the graphic quality. Color palette is restricted to deep indigo blue, warm mustard yellow, and classic black ink. High detail, perfect symmetry, vector art quality, print-ready.
